mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dog_dbti (DOGNO, E_PER, S_PER, A_PER, O_PER, UPDATE_DATE) VALUES (#{dogno}, #{ePer}, #{sPer}, #{aPer}, #{oPer}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT DOGNO, E_PER AS ePer, S_PER AS sPer, A_PER AS aPer, O_PER AS oPer, UPDATE_DATE AS updateDate FROM dog_dbti WHERE DOGNO = #{dogno}
